visual_description: The audio opens with a tense, atmospheric musical score, creating a mood of suspense and seriousness. The scene opens with a medium shot of two men in dark suits walking down a dimly lit, narrow corridor. The man on the left, with slicked-back hair, looks forward with a serious expression. The man on the right, with slightly disheveled hair, looks down and to the side, also appearing focused. In the background, the silhouettes of other people are visible further down the hallway. The camera follows the two men as they walk. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the upper left corner of the screen. The camera angle shifts slightly, showing the two men from a slightly different perspective as they continue their walk. The man on the left is now more in focus, his expression intense. The man on the right looks up and to the side, his face partially obscured. The background remains a dark, indistinct corridor. A man begins to speak in a calm, professional, and serious tone, as if briefing someone. He states, "这次的目标呢是一个贩毒集团" (This time's target is a drug trafficking syndicate).
